style.look: dark legal-tech documentary, realistic objects, restrained symbolic reconstruction, clean Remotion graphics
style.lighting: deep navy shadows, electric-blue phone/data glow, restrained gold only for warrant/court authority beats
style.typography: Impact/Arial Black display, Trebuchet/Helvetica body via remotion/src/brand.ts
style.texture: fine film grain, matte blacks, glass reflections, paper and evidence-table materials

continuity.present_phone: modern black smartphone, unreadable screen unless Remotion overlays exact text
continuity.symbolic_arrest_pov: hands, pocket, torso fragments only; no face; no identifiable defendant or officer
continuity.san_diego_2009: Southern California roadside suggested by light, car, and abstract map; no exact location claim beyond on-screen text
continuity.wallet_vs_phone: wallet is small and finite; phone expands into layered data space
continuity.data_layers: unreadable messages/photos/calendar/map/search blocks, no brand icons
continuity.cloud_threads: blue data lines moving from phone to abstract server/cloud shapes
continuity.katz_phone_booth: 1960s phone booth silhouette, face hidden, privacy field
continuity.location_trail: thin electric-blue pings/path, no real street labels
continuity.gold_warrant_stamp: gold line/stamp appears only around warrant-rule payoff

safety.ai_disclosure: All generated case-event visuals are symbolic reconstructions, not authentic footage.
safety.real_person_likeness_policy: David Riley and Brima Wurie must not be depicted as identifiable real people.
safety.vote_accuracy: Use 9-0 result or not one justice dissented; do not render as unanimous full reasoning.
prohibited: gang signs or sensational gang imagery
readable phone UI generated by image model
